MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Susan Concepcion (415-239-2770) Plaintiff/Petitioner/Moving party In Pro Per.
No other appearances.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SUSAN CONCEPCION's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is GRANTED. Petitioner met the requirement of CC 8480 et seq. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
